primary_text:
I used to grab whatever chicken was on special. Never read the label. Never thought about the farm.

Then I visited a regenerative property in NSW. Chickens on actual pasture. I talked to the farmer who raised them.

The meat was different. Firmer, more flavour, no water pooling in the tray.

That's when I understood what I'd been settling for. FarmThru brings that same food to the Brookvale hub. Named farms, no middlemen, days old not weeks.

You deserve to taste the difference.
headline: I never used to read the label
description: Pasture-raised chicken from named NSW farms. Collected from the Brookvale hub.
creative_brief: Warm, candid shot of someone holding a whole pasture-raised chicken, farm backdrop visible. Golden hour. Documentary feel, not staged.
